key_learnings: Originality is the hardest dimension (70% fail rate) - must have truly unique voice and angle
Engagement 5/5 requires gut-punch hook (not personal annoyance) AND specific reply-worthy question
Template phrases like 'nobody seems to mention' kill originality even if not exact match
Paragraph CV > 0.30 is critical for natural feel
Personal war stories with granular specifics (23 days, DM twice, multisig issues) score highest
Lowercase-only styling reads as applied affectation - mix case naturally
The 'trustless payment pipeline' angle was an untapped gap from pattern analysis
KOL pricing disruption question creates genuine engagement from multiple audience segments
